results.title: Operation Tiger In Maharashtra: Will Uddhav Thackeray's Sena Face Rebellion Again? Political Buzz Intensifies Amid UBT MPs' Meeting Shinde Camp Leaders
results.description: The alleged 'Operation Tiger' gained fresh attention after only four Shiv Sena UBT MPs attended Uddhav Thackeray's meeting physically, while the remaining members joined online. Reports have linked the development to rumours of defections to the Shinde faction. However, party leaders have dismissed the claims and asserted that their MPs remain firmly aligned.

results.title: ‘BJP-created shell party’: TMC MP Sagarika Ghose slams rebels over decision to join NCPI
results.description: While the TMC is led by Mamata Banerjee and backs the INDIA alliance, the rebel camp stands with BJP and is led by Prime Minister Narendra Modi, said the Rajya Sabha MP.

results.title: SSC GD Answer Key 2026 Objection Window open: How to challenge, fee and steps explained
results.description: The Staff Selection Commission (SSC) has opened the objection window for the SSC GD Constable Answer Key 2026. Candidates can challenge incorrect answers on the provisional key, response sheets, and question papers via the official SSC website until the deadline. A fee of Rs 50 per question applies for online submissions.

results.title: Supreme Court Prioritises PIL Alleging Inhuman Treatment of Children With Disabilities In Rehabilitation Centres
results.description: The Supreme Court issued notice and agreed to prioritise a PIL alleging serious regulatory failures and inhuman treatment of children with disabilities in rehabilitation centres across India
